ID: US-CMP-FE-410
Title: Role-aware default library views
Status: Done
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-25
Ticket: CMP-FE-410
Epic: CMP-E4: Content Library, Search, and Discovery
---

As a contributor
I want unclaimed and my claimed content prioritized so I can act quickly.
So posting opportunities are obvious without heavy filtering.

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Default view emphasizes unclaimed + my claimed sections.
- [ ] Posted content is hidden from default active view.
- [ ] Claimed cards show owner/date based on permission.
- [ ] Clear empty state when no available content.
- [ ] Card actions map to state and role.
